历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) regular classes was approximately 2778 → 2320 → 1918 → 2301 → 2108, showing an overall forward trend (intensified competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 670 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2108. 2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial science (physics category) plan was 68 in 2021, 67 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 74 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 79, an increase of 5 (+6.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and puts pressure on rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 50th (entering Top 50), a significant improvement from 60th in 2025, with stable and rising rankings in recent years, enhancing its appeal to candidates; recent reputation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 64th, rated as 'average', with medium short video exposure, no signs of unexpected cold or gaps. Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with BUPT's core advantageous disciplines, with no decrease in application enthusiasm; the province's 2026 physics category candidates are approximately 114,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a decrease of about 2.8% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition; the provincial control line (physics category undergraduate batch 360 points) has been basically stable in recent years; Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Heilongjiang candidates; the school's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2.2% (2025), at a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2026 expansion of 5 students (+6.8%) putting pressure on rankings to move backward, the Soft Science ranking rising to Top 50 enhancing appeal and pushing rankings forward, the provincial physics category candidate decrease of about 2.8% slightly easing competition, and the continued high popularity of information and communication majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 2108, the ranking is expected to move slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2208, with a range of 1877–2539.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 865 → 868 → 1017 → 1223 → 961, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2024, it clearly moved backward, then in 2025 it moved forward significantly. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 961. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. In 2026, it remains 12, with the plan unchanged for two consecutive years, indicating no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 50th place, a significant improvement from 60th in 2025, showing a steady upward trend in overall level. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 64th, rated as 'average,' with no signs of a cold snap or gap. BUPT's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering fields such as information and communication, computer science, and electronics. The liberal arts enrollment majors (joint law degree, English, network and new media, business administration) do not have directly corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, but the joint law degree with China University of Political Science and Law can leverage the A+ discipline reputation of CUPL's law program.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The law major is socially popular and recommended, network and new media belongs to the journalism and communication category (clearly discouraged), foreign languages are generally wait-and-see, and business administration is divided with a wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is approximately 53,000 (estimated based on historical proportion), a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. The provincial control line (history category undergraduate batch 405 points) has been basically stable in recent years. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts examinees in Heilongjiang. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang's liberal arts is extremely small (about 0.2%), making it a low-proportion province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a decrease of about 3.4% in the number of history category examinees in the province slightly easing competition, the improved Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, and the divergence in popularity of liberal arts majors (law is relatively hot but journalism and communication is discouraged), based on the 2025 baseline of 961, the ranking is expected to move forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 941, with a range of 800 to 1082.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<800), you can focus on aiming for the Law Joint Degree.
